title: ЭД4МК addon for MTR
description: Pack adds russian ED4MK sub-urban electric train with 1st, 2nd and 3rd class cars to MTR mod
body:
Higher and wider than built-in MTR trains. Catenary high is 7 blocks. Please use catenary poles and rails from [Slavic Railroad Pack](https://rumtr.miraheze.org/wiki/Slavic_Railroad_Pack). Low platform (most popular type in Russia) must be built using slabs, for high platforms use [Bits And Chisels](https://modrinth.com/mod/bits-and-chisels).

**NOT COMPATIBLE TO DEFAULT MTR PLATFORM BLOCKS!** Only put them under your platform to let the doors open. Only 4-12 car trains are possible, same as in real life. Use 0.8m/s² acceleration.

### **REQUIRES NTE!**

Questions and support - @omnihoundnew on Discord


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Original model was made for Trainz by AlekTo RZD, Dimaas, Ed4m, Levik70 and Vl92m

</details>
